title: semi-random-spawn
description: This is a plugin that allows users to set Zones. Each zone is an area that a player can spawn in. These zones can be set in a config file, you can have as many zones as you want. Each player will get a random spawn point in a random preset zone.
body: This is a plugin that allows users to set Zones. Each zone is a area that a player can spawn in. These zones can be set in a config file, you can have as many zones as you want. Each player will get a random spawn point in a random preset zone. If no zones are Set there will be a server-wide random spawn. Example Config ```yaml WelcomeMessage: "Welcome %player% to the server! Prepare to teleport" Zones: "Zone One": x1: 100 z1: 100 x2: 200 z2: 200 "Zone Two": x1: 300 z1: 300 x2: 400 z2: 400 ``` Please consider donating.
